troparion.text: Today the beginning of universal joy moves us to sing the prefestal hymn;  /  for Gabriel is coming and will cry to her:  /  "Rejoice, O Virgin full of grace, the Lord is with you.

kontakion.text: (Slavic)O Virgin Theotokos, you are the beginning of salvation for all of us on earth; /  for God's servant, the great Archangel Gabriel, was sent from Heaven to stand before you bringing you joy.  / Therefore we all cry to you: “Rejoice, unwedded Bride.”

troparion.text: By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, / and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / O our holy father Zachariah, pray to Christ our God to save our souls!

In truth you were revealed to your flock as a rule of faith, / an image of humility and a teacher of abstinence; / your humility exalted you; / your poverty enriched you. / Hierarch Father Artemon, / entreat Christ our God / that our souls may be saved.

saints.name: Venerable Zachariah the Ascetic of the Kiev Caves

troparion.text: By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, / and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / O our holy father Zachariah, pray to Christ our God to save our souls!

Your holy martyr Stephen, O Lord, / through his suffering has received an incorruptible crown from You, our God. / For having Your strength, he laid low his adversaries, / and shattered the powerless boldness of demons. / Through his intercessions, save our souls!

kontakion.text:
(Podoben: “You sought the heights...”)
You appeared as a bright star announcing Christ with your radiance,  / which is repulsive to this world, O Martyr Stephen;  / extinguishing the allure of false gods,  / you enlighten the faithful, /  always interceding for us all.

troparion.text: Your holy martyr Peter, O Lord, / through his suffering has received an incorruptible crown from You, our God. / For having Your strength, he laid low his adversaries, / and shattered the powerless boldness of demons. / Through his intercessions, save our souls!

kontakion.text:
(Podoben: “You sought the heights...”)
You appeared as a bright star announcing Christ with your radiance,  / which is repulsive to this world, O Martyr Peter;  / extinguishing the allure of false gods,  / you enlighten the faithful, /  always interceding for us all.
